content: CRD OpenAPI schema (structural schema + CEL via x-kubernetes-validations, stable since 1.29) handles field-level and cross-field invariants cheaply, at admission, with no extra pods/certs — prefer it. Reserve a real ValidatingWebhook only when the decision needs data outside the CR itself (cross-object lookups, e.g. 'does the referenced Secret/HTTPRoute exist and is it consistent'), or when the logic is too complex/readable for CEL. Best practice is CRD-schema-first, webhook only for what schema+CEL structurally cannot express.
